use_cases: Switching between different content sections within a single view without page navigation
Creating organized tabbed interfaces for managing dashboard sections and settings
Building navigation menus with clear active state indicators and disabled states
Organizing form content or multi-step workflows into categorized tabs
Displaying categorized data views with selectable tab filters
ai_summary: A lightweight, dual-variant tab navigation component with primary (underline border style) and secondary (pill/rounded style) modes. Supports disabled states, icons, and tooltips with smooth hover and click interactions. Built with minimal styling using utility-first classes for easy customization across SaaS, fintech, and general web applications.
